_provenance.query: MATCH (a:Method)<-[r1:CALLS]-(b:Method) WHERE a.file_path IN ['src/main/java/es/name/restaurants/application/port/repository/CourseRepositoryPort.java'] AND a.name = 'save' AND r1.confidence >= 0.55 RETURN a.file_path AS a_file, a.name AS a_name, b.name AS b_name, b.file_path AS b_file, r1.confidence AS r1_conf LIMIT 200
_provenance.note: Same shape/content as impacted-inbound.json (callersOf uses the identical query shape design §3.3 specifies) -- kept as a separate file per the 4a.0.2 task's explicit naming (callers.json), used by the callersOf-specific test suite rather than the impactedSymbols inbound-hop suite, even though the captured data is the same real edge.
